BASE.name: ATTACK_VECTOR
BASE.justification: The configuration references an external domain that can be abused remotely.

BASE.name: ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
BASE.justification: Exploitation relies on external resource manipulation without special conditions.

BASE.name: PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
BASE.justification: An attacker may leverage misconfigured profiles or injected resources without elevated privileges.

BASE.name: USER_INTERACTION
BASE.justification: The external resource may execute automatically without user interaction.

BASE.name: SCOPE
BASE.justification: The impact remains within the Salesforce org consuming the external resource.

BASE.name: CONFIDENTIALITY
BASE.justification: Malicious external scripts may exfiltrate sensitive user or session data.

BASE.name: INTEGRITY
BASE.justification: Injected or redirected scripts can alter application behavior and data.

BASE.name: AVAILABILITY
BASE.justification: Availability may be impacted if the external service becomes unavailable.

TEMPORAL.name: EXPLOIT_CODE_MATURITY
TEMPORAL.justification: External script hijacking and open redirect abuses are well documented.

TEMPORAL.name: REMEDIATION_LEVEL
TEMPORAL.justification: Salesforce recommends removing external references and using trusted static resources.

TEMPORAL.name: REPORT_CONFIDENCE
TEMPORAL.justification: The risk is clearly identified through configuration analysis.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_ATTACK_VECTOR
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: The external dependency remains reachable over the network.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Environmental factors do not significantly reduce exploitability.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: No additional privileges are required in the target org.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_USER_INTERACTION
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Scripts may load automatically based on configuration.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_SCOPE
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: The scope remains within the Salesforce organization.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_CONFIDENTIALITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Sensitive org and user data may be exposed.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_INTEGRITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Injected scripts can compromise application integrity.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_AVAILABILITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Availability impact is possible but secondary.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: CONFIDENTIALITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Protection of Salesforce data is critical.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: INTEGRITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Integrity of UI and org behavior is essential.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: AVAILABILITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Availability is important but not the primary concern.
